parameters.jsonBody:
={{
  JSON.stringify({
    "contents": [{
      "parts": [{
        "text": `You are a Career Classification Expert specializing in automation and operations roles.

Your task: Determine if this job posting is a TECHNICAL AUTOMATION or OPERATIONS ENGINEERING role that matches this profile:

=== TARGET PROFILE ===
An AI Automation Engineer who:
• Builds workflow automation systems (n8n, Make, Zapier)
• Integrates APIs and creates data pipelines
• Develops internal tools and dashboards
• Automates revenue operations and business processes
• Works with AI APIs (Claude, OpenAI) for intelligent workflows

=== JOB POSTING ===
${ $('Extract_Job_Description').first().json.data }

=== EVALUATION CRITERIA ===

0. LOCATION & ELIGIBILITY GATEKEEPER (The First Filter)
The candidate is based in NIGERIA (Africa) but works globally. 

✅ PASS (Eligibility) if:
• Role is Fully Remote (Worldwide, Global, Anywhere, or EMEA).
• Role is "Remote" with no specific country restrictions.
• Engagement type is Full-time, Contract, or B2B (Open to all).

❌ IMMEDIATE FAIL (STOP HERE) if the job explicitly requires:
• "Must reside in [Specific Country]" (that is not Nigeria).
• "US Citizenship," "Green Card," or "Security Clearance."
• "Hybrid" or "On-site" (Must be 100% Remote).

(Note: Do NOT reject "Full-time" roles. Reject only if the LOCATION is restricted.)

1. BUILDER vs. USER TEST (Critical)
✅ PASS if role involves:
• Designing/building workflows or automation
• Connecting APIs, webhooks, or systems
• Creating internal tools or integrations
• Writing scripts for automation (Python, JavaScript)
• "Engineer," "Developer," "Architect," "Specialist," "Intern," or "Trainee" roles

❌ FAIL if role involves:
• Only USING automation tools (not building)
• Marketing/Sales roles that mention "automation tools"
• Customer Success using CRM features
• Content creation with AI assistants

2. IMPLICIT TECH STACK
✅ PASS if mentions:
• APIs, REST, webhooks, JSON, HTTP requests
• System integration, data syncing, ETL/data pipelines
• Low-code/no-code platforms, workflow engines
• Internal tools, admin panels, dashboards
• Python/JavaScript for automation (not web dev)

3. EXPLICIT TOOL SIGNALS (High Confidence)
✅ PASS if mentions:
• Workflow: n8n, Make, Zapier, Tray.io, Workato, Parabola
• Internal tools: Retool, Streamlit, admin dashboards
• AI/LLM: OpenAI API, Anthropic API, LangChain, RAG systems
• Data: Airbyte, Fivetran, database automation
• Business automation: HubSpot workflows, Salesforce automation

4. BUSINESS OPERATIONS CONTEXT
✅ PASS if:
• Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Business Operations roles
• GTM Systems, Deal Desk, Sales Enablement with automation focus
• CRM workflow building (not just using)
• Mentions: "manual processes," "data entry," "streamline operations"

5. EXCLUSIONS (Auto-Reject)
❌ FAIL if PRIMARY focus is:
• QA Automation (Selenium, Cypress, test frameworks)
• Industrial Automation (PLC, SCADA, robotics, manufacturing)
• Pure Infrastructure DevOps (Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins as main skills)
• Civil/Mechanical Engineering with "automation" in different context
• Data Science/ML Engineering (model training, not workflow automation)

⚠️ NUANCE for DevOps:
• INCLUDE: "DevOps Engineer - Automation Focus" with workflow/integration keywords
• EXCLUDE: "DevOps Engineer" focused solely on infrastructure/containers

=== OUTPUT FORMAT ===
Respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown, no preamble):

{
  "is_valid_role": true or false,
  "confidence": "high" or "medium" or "low",
  "primary_reason": "One sentence explaining the decision",
  "matched_signals": ["list", "of", "key", "signals", "found"],
  "red_flags": ["list", "of", "concerns", "if", "any"]
}

=== EXAMPLES ===
(Use the logic from previous examples, omitted here for brevity but the AI understands the criteria)`
      }]
    }],
    "generationConfig": {
      "temperature": 0.1,
      "topP": 0.95,
      "topK": 40,
      "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
      "responseMimeType": "application/json"
    }
  })
}}

={{
  JSON.stringify({
    "contents": [{
      "parts": [{
        "text": `You are an Expert Resume Architect and Career Strategist.
Your goal is to analyze the "Master CV" against the "Job Description" to create a tailored application strategy.

=== MASTER CANDIDATE PROFILE (CONTEXT) ===
${$('Resume_Vault').item.json.cv_text_context}

=== AVAILABLE PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE (IDs) ===
${$('Resume_Vault').item.json.project_list.join('\n')}

=== JOB POSTING ===
${$('Extract_Job_Description').first().json.data}

=== PART 1: THE ANALYST (SCORING RUBRIC) ===
Calculate a fit score (0-100) using this adjusted breakdown:

1. TECH STACK COVERAGE (40 points max)
   - Identify the *Critical* tools/languages in the JD (The "Must Haves").
   - Calculate what % of these specific critical tools the candidate possesses (based on Master Profile).
   - 100% Coverage = 40pts | 75% Coverage = 30pts | 50% Coverage = 20pts | <50% Coverage = 0pts.

2. COMPLEXITY MATCH (20 points max)
   - IGNORE "Years of Experience" text requirements.
   - Focus on *Project Complexity*. Does the candidate's "Master Profile" demonstrate the technical ability to solve the problems described in the JD?
   - High Complexity Match (Candidate has built similar systems) = 20pts.
   - Medium Match = 10pts.
   - Low Match (Candidate projects are too simple) = 0pts.

3. DOMAIN EXPERTISE (20 points max)
   - Projects match specific domain (e.g., RevOps, Logistics, Email Infra) = 20pts.
   - Related domain = 10pts.
   - No overlap = 0pts.

4. REQUIREMENTS COVERAGE (20 points max)
   - Scan for "Requirements", "Qualifications", or "Must Haves".
   - Meets ALL mandatory non-tech requirements = 20pts.
   - Missing 1-2 mandatory requirements = 10pts.
   - Missing 3+ mandatory requirements = 0pts.

=== PART 2: THE BUILDER (STRATEGY & ASSEMBLY) ===
You are the strategist. You do not write the experience blocks; you select and order them.

1. PROFILE REWRITE (The Writer):
   - **JOB TITLE:** Extract the Job Title from the posting, but **CLEAN THE FORMATTING**.
     - Remove underscores ('_'), internal job IDs (e.g., 'SROO4', 'Req-123'), and system artifacts.
     - Remove generic location suffixes like ' - Remote' or '(Worldwide)' unless it's part of the core role name.
     - **Example:** If JD says 'n8n_Developer___REMOTE_SROO4', you write 'n8n Developer'.
     - **CONSTRAINT:** Do NOT add new words (e.g., do not change "Developer" to "Architect" unless the JD says so). Keep the employer's core terminology.
   - **SUMMARY:** Rewrite the "Profile" summary using only facts from the Master Profile.
- **AGGRESSIVE REFRAMING:** Actively act as a "Chameleon." Translate the candidate's existing experience into the exact vocabulary of the Job Description. If the JD asks for "Cross-functional synchronization" and the candidate built a "Logistics Dispatch System," describe the system as enabling "cross-functional synchronization." Use the employer's exact phrases naturally in the SUMMARY.

2. EXPERIENCE RE-RANKING (The DJ):
   - Look at the "AVAILABLE PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE" list of IDs.
   - Return a list of **ALL** IDs re-ordered based on relevance to this job.
   - The most relevant experience must be #1.
   - **CRITICAL:** You must include ALL IDs from the menu. Do not delete any. Just sort them.
- **CRITICAL LOCK:** The ID "consultancy_header" is the structural anchor. It MUST always be the absolute #1 first item in your returned array. You may only re-rank the remaining projects beneath it.

3. EVIDENCE SELECTION:
   - Identify the specific technical skills from the CV that apply to this job.

4. LOGISTICS CHECK:
   - Scan for instructions (Cover letter, specific subject lines, video requests).

=== THE "DO NOT INJECT" BOUNDARIES (ABSOLUTE) ===
You must aggressively reframe the summary, but you MUST NEVER hallucinate or lie. You are strictly forbidden from injecting:
1. Years of Experience: Do not invent years of tenure. Rely on the "June 2025 - Present" Consultancy timeline.
2. Degrees/Certifications: Do not invent degrees, university names, or AWS/Cloud certifications.
3. Headcount/Team Size: Do not claim the candidate managed a team of developers. 
4. Proprietary Tools: Do not claim experience with internal/proprietary company software mentioned in the JD.
5. Plagiarism: Do not copy entire sentences from the JD word-for-word. Weave the keywords into the candidate's actual project impacts.

=== OUTPUT FORMAT (JSON ONLY) ===
Respond ONLY with this valid JSON structure:

{
  "analysis": {
    "fit_score": 85,
    "match_level": "High/Medium/Low",
    "score_breakdown": {
      "tech_stack": 0,
      "complexity": 0,
      "domain": 0,
      "requirements": 0
    },
    "critical_missing_keywords": ["List of missing hard skills"]
  },
  "logistics": {
    "requires_cover_letter": true,
    "requires_loom_video": false,
    "requires_portfolio_link": true,
    "special_instructions": "Any specific instructions like 'Subject line: Blue Pineapple'"
  },
  "builder": {
    "tailored_title": "The specific Job Title to use (e.g. 'Revenue Operations Engineer')",
    "tailored_identity_text": "The rewritten 3-sentence profile summary...",
    "relevant_tech_stack_list": ["List only the tools relevant to this specific job found in CV"],
    "project_order": [
      {
        "id": "project_id_from_menu",
        "relevance_reason": "Why this is #1"
      },
      {
        "id": "project_id_from_menu",
        "relevance_reason": "Why this is #2"
      }
      // Continue for ALL IDs in the Menu
    ]
  },
  "cover_letter_strategy": {
    "hook": "The specific achievement to mention in the opening line",
    "key_alignment": "The 2 core skills to focus on in the body"
  }
}

=== EXAMPLES ===
(Use the logic from previous examples, omitted here for brevity but the AI understands the criteria)`
      }]
    }],
    "generationConfig": {
      "temperature": 0.1,
      "maxOutputTokens": 8192,
      "responseMimeType": "application/json"
    }
  })
}}

parameters.text:
={{ 
// 🚨 SCENARIO 1: TOTAL FAILURE (Both Robots Died)
$json.is_error && $json.is_pdf_error ? 
"⚠️ *System Failure* ⚠️

I analyzed the job, but both the Cover Letter AI and the PDF Generator timed out.

🆔 *Role:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_title + "

=== JOB POST LINK ===
" + $('Unit_Job_Processor').item.json.job_url :

// ✍️ SCENARIO 2: WRITER'S BLOCK (Letter Failed, PDF Good)
$json.is_error ? 
"⚠️ *Writer's Block Detected!* ⚠️

I generated the PDF Resume (attached below), but the Cover Letter AI timed out.

" +
"🆔 *Target Role:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_title + 
"
🧠 *Strategy:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_identity_text.replace(/\*/g, '').replace(/_/g, ' ') +
"

📋 *APPLICATION LOGISTICS*
" + 
"✍️ *Cover Letter:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_cover_letter ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"🎨 *Portfolio:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_portfolio_link ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"📹 *Video Intro:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_loom_video ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"📝 *Instructions:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.special_instructions || "None") +
"

📂 *Action Required:* Write cover letter manually.

=== JOB POST LINK ===
" + $('Unit_Job_Processor').item.json.job_url :

// 📄 SCENARIO 3: PDF FAILURE (Letter Good, PDF Failed)
$json.is_pdf_error ?
($if($("Renamer").isExecuted, $("Renamer").item.json.application_status, $("Euphemizer").item.json.application_status) + 
"

⚠️ *PDF Generation Failed* ⚠️
(The CloudConvert service timed out, but here is your Strategy & Draft)

" +
"🆔 *Target Role:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_title + 
"
🧠 *Strategy:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_identity_text.replace(/\*/g, '').replace(/_/g, ' ') +
"

📋 *APPLICATION LOGISTICS*
" + 
"✍️ *Cover Letter:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_cover_letter ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"🎨 *Portfolio:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_portfolio_link ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"📹 *Video Intro:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_loom_video ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"📝 *Instructions:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.special_instructions || "None") +
"

=== COVER LETTER ===

" + 
$json.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text.replace(/\*/g, '•').replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\[/g, '(').replace(/\]/g, ')') + 
"

=== JOB POST LINK ===
" + $('Unit_Job_Processor').item.json.job_url) :

// 🚀 SCENARIO 4: SUCCESS (Everything Works)
($if($("Renamer").isExecuted, $("Renamer").item.json.application_status, $("Euphemizer").item.json.application_status) + 
"

🚀 *STRATEGY & DRAFT*
" +
"🆔 *Target Role:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_title + 
"
🧠 *Strategy:* " + $('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.builder.tailored_identity_text.replace(/\*/g, '').replace(/_/g, ' ') +
"

📋 *APPLICATION LOGISTICS*
" + 
"✍️ *Cover Letter:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_cover_letter ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"🎨 *Portfolio:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_portfolio_link ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"📹 *Video Intro:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.requires_loom_video ? "✅ Required" : "❌ No") + "
" +
"📝 *Instructions:* " + ($('Parse_Architect_Response').item.json.resume_strategy.logistics.special_instructions || "None") +
"

=== COVER LETTER ===

" + 
$json.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text.replace(/\*/g, '•').replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\[/g, '(').replace(/\]/g, ')') + 
"

=== JOB POST LINK ===
" + $('Unit_Job_Processor').item.json.job_url) 
}}

parameters.jsCode:
const blocks = { // --- SECTION 1: IDENTITY & COMPETENCIES --- "professional_identity": `

PROFILE

Backend automation engineer who builds autonomous business systems that protect and generate revenue. I don't just connect apps—I architect self-healing logic layers that enforce business rules, detect financial leaks, and scale operations without adding headcount. I use low-code infrastructure (n8n) to move faster than traditional dev teams, but I build with the technical rigor of a backend engineer. My core focus includes CRM Automation, intelligent data pipelines, and "Agentic" workflows.

`, "core_competencies": `
Core Competencies: CRM Automation • Revenue Operations Automation • API Orchestration • LLM-Powered Workflows • AI RAG-Based Chatbots • Dashboard Automation • AI Voice Agents • Agentic Workflows
`, // --- SECTION 2: PORTFOLIO (Projects) --- "consultancy_header": `
INDEPENDENT AI AUTOMATION CONSULTANT
Lagos, Nigeria | Oct 2025 – Present

Architecting and deploying end-to-end automation systems for diverse B2B and B2C clients to eliminate operational bottlenecks and protect revenue.

`, "project_agency_revenue": `
Agency Revenue Protection System
Built for: Developer Staffing Augmentation Agency | Problem Solved: Revenue leakage from unbilled hours, idle capacity, and expired contracts.
Business Impact:
  • Eliminates $100K+ annual revenue leakage from underlogged hours.
  • Reduces contract renewal cycle from 14 days → 2 days.
  • Frees 10 hours/week of operations manager time.
`, "project_laundry_logistics": `
Laundry Logistics Dispatch System
Built for: Commercial Laundry Service (B2C Operations) | Problem Solved: Manual rider assignment bottleneck during peak hours.
Business Impact:
  • Reduces average dispatch time from 30 minutes → 90 seconds.
  • Eliminates 100% of manual rider coordination.
  • Processes orders with zero failed dispatches.
`, "project_revenue_dashboards": `
Revenue Intelligence Dashboard System
System A: Capacity Intelligence Dashboard

Built for agency leadership to provide real-time views of developer availability and revenue risks. Aggregates data from Jira, Toggl, and CRM to calculate utilization rates automatically.

  • Impact: Enabled proactive hiring decisions (forecasting bench gaps 6 weeks ahead) and eliminated weekly status meetings (saved 3 hours/week).
System B: Laundry Business Command Center

Built for operations managers to track live orders, revenue, and delivery performance with Chart.js visualizations.

  • Impact: Replaced 2 hours/day of manual Excel updates and provided an audit trail for financial reconciliation.
Tech Stack: n8n (data orchestration), Baserow (data warehouse), Google Sheets (visualization), Chart.js and Custom Scripting.
`, "project_whatsapp_agent": `
WhatsApp Customer Service and Order Collection Agent
Built for: Commercial Laundry Service (End-to-End Customer Experience Automation) | Problem Solved: Manual order intake bottlenecks, missed after-hours orders, and phone distractions.
Business Impact:
  • Deflects 80% of phone calls to WhatsApp (frees operations team from 50+ daily interruptions).
  • Enabled 24/7 order collection (captures orders from after-hours customers).
  • Reduced order intake time from 8 minutes (phone) → 4 minutes (Agentic chat).
`, "project_cold_email": `
Cold Email Outreach System
Built for: Client Acquisition Teams | Problem Solved: Manual prospecting doesn't scale; hiring SDRs is too expensive.
Business Impact:
  • Generated 100+ qualified leads per day.
  • Zero spam complaints (domain reputation maintained).
`, "project_backlog_enrichment": `
Backlog Enrichment Workflow
Built for: Sales Operations (Lead Scoring System) | Problem Solved: Incomplete lead data → Poor prioritization → Wasted SDR time.
Business Impact:
  • Allowed SDR team to focus on high-intent leads only.
  • Reduced 'bad data' complaints from sales.
  • Enabled automated lead scoring based on seniority/department.
`, "project_job_bot": `
Autonomous Job Application System
Problem Solved: High-volume job hunting is manual, time-consuming, and has low conversion rates.
Current Status: "Master-Worker" agent architecture in development; targeting 50 tailored applications/week at launch.
`, // --- SECTION 3: TECHNICAL STACK --- "technical_stack": `

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Orchestration & Automation: n8n (Expert Level), Make.com, Zapier, Webhooks, REST API Integration, Custom API Chaining.
Scripting & Logic: HTML, CSS, Javascript, Python, NextJS
AI & Agents: Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI(ChatGPT), Gemini, Claudecode, Gemini CLI, RAG-Based Chatbots, AI Voice Agents, Vapi, Retell, ElevenLabs, Pinecone (Vector Database), Large Language Models (LLMs), Prompt Engineering.
Data & Backend: Supabase, Airtable, Baserow, Google Workspace, Notion, JSON Data Structures.
CRM & Business Operations Management: GoHighLevel (GHL), HubSpot, Asana, Clickup, Trello, Email Marketing(Klaviyo, ActiveCampaign, MailChimp), Freshdesk, WordPress(CMS Integration) WhatsApp Cloud API, Twilio, Paystack, Slack API.
`, // --- SECTION 4: EXPERIENCE & EDUCATION --- "experience": `

ADDITIONAL EXPERIENCE

OPERATIONS LEAD | STUDENT ORGANIZATION (January 2024 – January 2025)
Elected to lead administrative and financial operations for a large-scale university organization (200+ members).
  • Transferable Skills: Deadline management under pressure, stakeholder communication, and resource allocation—the same skills required to manage SLAs and cross-functional automation projects.
`, "education": `

EDUCATION

OBAFEMI AWOLOWO UNIVERSITY
Bachelor of Science in Applied Sciences | Expected Graduation: 2027
  • Relevant Coursework: Systems Thinking & Root-Cause Analysis (diagnostic logic for complex systems), Statistical Methods (data validation, anomaly detection), Project Management.
`, // --- SECTION 5: PHILOSOPHY --- "philosophy": `
WHY I BUILD THIS WAY

Most automation engineers treat tools like Zapier or n8n as 'glue' between apps. I treat them as a backend development platform.

My Philosophy:
  • ✓ Every workflow should have error recovery (not just 'fail and alert')
  • ✓ Business logic should be encoded in the system (not in someone's head)
  • ✓ Automation should reduce human decision-making (not just manual clicking)
`, // --- SECTION 6: AVAILABILITY --- "availability": `
AVAILABILITY & LOGISTICS
  • Location: Lagos, Nigeria (UTC+1) | Open to remote roles globally
  • Work Authorization: Nigerian citizen; eligible for remote contractor agreements
  • Preferred Role Types: Full-time, contract (6+ months), or project-based engagements
  • Salary Expectations: Competitive with market rates for AI Automation Engineers.
` }; // --- META DATA --- const my_profile = { "name": "FAITH LEKE-AKINGBOYE", "Linkedin Profile": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/faith-leke-akingboye", "GitHub Portfolio": "https://github.com/Faith-Leke/Automation-Portfolio", "Meet Faith": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1slHiwXzu9JhmOGwv8XBAQLSV_oHixTuk/view", "email": "faithlekeakingboye@gmail.com", "phone": "+2348101006152", "location": "Lagos, Nigeria" }; const tech_stack_list = [ "n8n (Expert Level)", "Make.com", "Zapier", "Pinecone", "Supabase", "Airtable", "Baserow", "GoHighLevel (GHL)", "HubSpot", "WhatsApp Cloud API", "Twilio", "Paystack", "Slack API", "Gemini", "Claude", "OpenAI", "Python", "JavaScript", "REST API", "Webhooks" ]; const cv_text_context = ` FAITH LEKE-AKINGBOYE. AI Automation Engineer | Revenue Operations Architect. Projects: Agency Revenue Protection, Laundry Dispatch, Revenue Dashboards, Cold Email, Backlog Enrichment, WhatsApp Agent, Job Bot. Tech Stack: n8n, AI Agents, RAG, CRM Automation, Baserow, GoHighLevel. Experience: Operations Lead. Education: Obafemi Awolowo University (2027). `; const project_list = [ "consultancy_header", "project_agency_revenue", "project_laundry_logistics", "project_revenue_dashboards", "project_whatsapp_agent", "project_cold_email", "project_backlog_enrichment", "project_job_bot" ]; return { json: { blocks: blocks, tech_stack: tech_stack_list, cv_text_context: cv_text_context, project_list: project_list, my_name: my_profile.name, my_linkedin: my_profile.linkedin, my_email: my_profile.email, my_phone: my_profile.phone, my_location: my_profile.location } };

parameters.text:
=Analysis Complete: Hard Pass. 🛑

{{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.chat.first_name }}, I know you are Job Hunting but this Job is not a good fit for you

Here's why I rejected it: *{{ $json.ai_analysis.primary_reason }}*

I’ve skipped the application process for this one. Send me the next link! 🏹

=Dead End Detected! 🚧

I tried to track that link, but the scent went cold. It seems to be broken, empty, or inaccessible.

Please double-check:

Is the URL complete?

Is the job post still active?

Paste a fresh link, and I'll get back to work! 🕵️‍♂️

=System Hiccup! ⚠️

I found the job, but my brain (the AI server) blinked. I couldn't complete the analysis this time.

Status: Analysis Failed Action: You might want to try this link again in a few minutes.

I've logged this error and am resetting my sensors. 🤖

=Perfect Match Detected! 🚀  

This job hits your criteria. I am now initiating the application protocol:  

✍️ Drafting: Tailored Cover Letter 📄 Compiling: PDF Resume  

Hold tight—I'll send the files in about 30 seconds. ⏳

=System Hiccup! ⚠️

I found the job, but my brain (the AI server) blinked. I couldn't complete the analysis this time.

Status: Analysis Failed Action: You might want to try this link again in a few minutes.

I've logged this error and am resetting my sensors. 🤖

=Manual Review Recommended! ⚠️

This job hits most of your criteria, but I've flagged it for a human check just to be safe.

I am initiating the application protocol so you have the drafts ready:

✍️ Drafting: Tailored Cover Letter
📄 Compiling: PDF Resume

Hold tight—I'll send the files for your approval in about 30 seconds. ⏳

=I'm your Personal Job Hunter, but I can't hunt without a scent! 

🛑  I am strictly configured to process Job Links (Greenhouse, Lever, LinkedIn, etc.).  

Please paste a valid URL (starting with https or www) so I can analyze the role, rewrite your resume, and draft your cover letter so you can smash that application. 💼
